title: Natural Health Products - Canada.ca
content:
## Natural Health Products
The Natural and Non-prescription Health Products Directorate (NNHPD) has produced numerous publications concerning its Directorate and its Regulatory framework. Committee publications, Transition team and consultations reports can be accessed electronically through these links.

## Reports and Publications
- Boron as a Medicinal Ingredient in Oral Natural Health Products
- Natural Health Products: 53 Recommendations of the Standing Committee on Health
- Proposed Regulations - Canada Gazette Part I (December 22, 2001)
- Natural Health Products: A New Vision (Report of the Standing Committee on Health, November 1998)

## Natural Health Products Online Solution
- User Manuals: Electronic Product Licence Application user manual Natural Health Products Ingredients Database Web Application Guide Natural Health Products Online System Standard Terminology Guide Guidance Document on how to interact with the Natural and Non-Prescription Health Products Directorate electronically
- Electronic Product Licence Application user manual
- Natural Health Products Ingredients Database Web Application Guide
- Natural Health Products Online System Standard Terminology Guide
- Guidance Document on how to interact with the Natural and Non-Prescription Health Products Directorate electronically
- Applications and Submissions
- It's Your Health - Safe Use of Natural Health Products
